story.description: A clip of conservation, restoration, habitats, reforestation, or protected nature: lush green landscape with dense vegetation
story.hook: Trees record hard seasons inside rings.
story.lead: Trees record hard seasons inside rings. Watch the ring pattern first because fast growth leaves wider bands and stress leaves tighter ones. A trunk can store weather history year by year. Which tree clue should we decode next?
